prerequisites: A SolarWinds Service Desk account on a plan that includes API access. Only a user with a Service Desk administrator license can generate the API token.
An API token (JSON Web Token) generated from the administrator's own user setup page, supplied as the connector's required api_key_2 field.
Knowledge of your account's regional API host: https://api.samanage.com (US), https://apieu.samanage.com (EU), or https://apiau.samanage.com (APJ).
A start_date value (required) marking the earliest point from which records should be synced.

authMethods.name: API token (JSON Web Token)
authMethods.summary: Token-based authentication. The token (the connector's api_key_2 field) is sent on each request in the X-Samanage-Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'. The token is a long JSON Web Token string generated by a Service Desk administrator. Regenerating a user's token invalidates all previously generated tokens, and disabling the user disables the token.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API token in SolarWinds Service Desk
setupSteps.body: Sign in as a Service Desk administrator (only an administrator license can generate a token). Go to Setup > Users & Groups > Users and open your own user detail page. Click Actions and select Generate JSON Web Token, then click Copy to copy the token. Regenerating the token invalidates any previously issued tokens, and disabling the user also disables the token.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your regional API host
setupSteps.body: Identify the correct API host for your account region: https://api.samanage.com for US customers, https://apieu.samanage.com for European customers, or https://apiau.samanage.com for APJ customers. The API is served over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configuration to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token as the required api_key_2 field. Set the required start_date to the earliest date from which the connector should sync records. The connector authenticates by sending the token in the X-Samanage-Authorization: Bearer <token> header along with a versioned Accept header (for example application/vnd.samanage.v2.1+json).

sources.title: Token authentication for API integration - SolarWinds Service Desk documentation
